title: Signal Filters
description: Filters to refine signal discovery results

max_cpm.description: Maximum CPM filter. Applies only to signals with model='cpm'.

max_percent.description: Maximum percent-of-media rate filter. Signals where all percent_of_media pricing options exceed this value are excluded. Does not account for max_cpm caps.

ext.description: Vendor-namespaced extension parameters for seller- or platform-specific signal filter criteria not covered by standard fields. Keys MUST be namespaced under a vendor or platform key (e.g., ext.gam, ext.platform_x). Sellers MUST treat all values as untrusted buyer input; avoid unbounded logging or labels, and do not interpolate values into caller-visible error strings, LLM prompts, SQL queries, or system commands without sanitization. Persistent use of an extension key across multiple buyers is a signal to propose standardization.
